message:
feat(web): complete TypeScript migration with all features

Add full App class with:
- Tab management with history (LRU switching)
- Split panel support
- Command palette with keyboard shortcuts
- Upload/download dialogs
- Access control dialog for auth management
- Tab overview with live previews
- Binary protocol handlers for server messages

New modules:
- dialogs.ts: CommandPalette, UploadDialog, DownloadDialog, AccessControlDialog
- file-transfer.ts: FileTransferHandler with compression

Build output: 63.23 KB minified (8 modules)
